name: Tenable Cloud Security
description: Cloud security platform providing CNAPP capabilities including CSPM, CIEM, IaC security, and vulnerability management across multi-cloud environments

actions.name: List Findings
actions.description: Retrieve cloud security findings including misconfigurations, IAM risks, and network exposures

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: cloud_provider
parameters.description: Filter by cloud provider (aws, azure, gcp)

actions.name: List Cloud Accounts
actions.description: List onboarded cloud accounts and their scanning status

parameters.name: provider
parameters.description: Filter by cloud provider (aws, azure, gcp)

actions.name: Get Compliance Status
actions.description: Retrieve compliance assessment status for configured frameworks

parameters.name: framework
parameters.description: Compliance framework name (e.g., CIS, SOC2, NIST, PCI-DSS)

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Filter by specific cloud account ID

actions.name: List IaC Violations
actions.description: Retrieve Infrastructure as Code security violations from scanned repositories

actions.name: List Assets
actions.description: List cloud assets discovered across all connected accounts with risk scoring

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Asset type filter (e.g., ec2, s3, rds, lambda)

actions.name: Get IAM Analysis
actions.description: Retrieve IAM entitlement analysis showing overprivileged identities and excessive permissions

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: Cloud account ID for IAM analysis

parameters.name: risk_level
parameters.description: Filter by risk level (critical, high, medium, low)
